tasks.prompt: Add global rate limiting using @nestjs/throttler. Install the package and update package.json. Register ThrottlerModule in src/app.module.ts with default ttl=60 and limit=100. Add ThrottlerGuard as a global APP_GUARD provider in src/app.module.ts. Create src/shared/throttle.config.ts with the rate-limit configuration constants.

Add role-based access control. Add a 'role' column (enum: 'user', 'admin') to src/user/user.entity.ts with default 'user'. Create src/user/roles.guard.ts implementing CanActivate that checks user.role. Create src/user/roles.decorator.ts with a @Roles() decorator. Register the guard in src/app.module.ts as a global provider. Update src/user/user.interface.ts to include the role field.

Add a bookmarking feature (save-for-later, separate from favorites). Create src/article/bookmark.entity.ts as a join entity with userId and articleId columns plus @ManyToOne relations to UserEntity and ArticleEntity. Add a @OneToMany bookmarks relation on src/user/user.entity.ts pointing to the BookmarkEntity. Add POST /api/articles/:slug/bookmark and DELETE /api/articles/:slug/bookmark endpoints in src/article/article.controller.ts. Add bookmarkArticle and unbookmarkArticle methods in src/article/article.service.ts. Register BookmarkEntity in src/article/article.module.ts TypeORM imports.

Extend the tag module with create and delete operations. The existing src/tag/tag.controller.ts only has GET /tags. Add POST /tags and DELETE /tags/:id endpoints to src/tag/tag.controller.ts. Add corresponding create and delete methods in src/tag/tag.service.ts. Add CreateTagDto in src/tag/dto/create-tag.dto.ts for validation.

Add full-text search to articles. The existing findAll method in src/article/article.service.ts only filters by tag, author, and favorited - it has no text search on title or body. Add a searchArticles method in src/article/article.service.ts using TypeORM QueryBuilder with LIKE on title and body fields. Add a GET /api/articles/search?q=query endpoint in src/article/article.controller.ts. Create src/article/dto/search-query.dto.ts for query validation.

Add a health check endpoint using @nestjs/terminus. Install the package and update package.json. Create src/health/health.module.ts and src/health/health.controller.ts with a GET /health endpoint that checks TypeORM database connectivity via TypeOrmHealthIndicator. Register HealthModule in src/app.module.ts imports.
